properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v4 v8 v6 v5 v6 v5 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus, we lift you on our praises So every eye can see your face your power and grace Behold you as you really are

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Brighter than all the stars of heaven Our worship is for you alone We build you this throne of praise

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As long as I have breath I'll find a way to say that I love you Every thing may change and the world may pass away I'll still Love you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: With every song we sing Every prayer we pray We'll build you a throne Made from the sound of praise

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus, we lift you on our praises So every eye can see Your face Your power and grace Behold You as You really are

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Brighter than all the stars of heaven Our worship is for You alone We build You this throne of praise

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You O Lord deserve the praise of all earth And we worship You A Sacrifice you died now great and glorified And we worship You

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Jesus, we lift you on our praises So every eye can see Your face, Your power and grace Behold You as You really are

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Brighter than all the stars of heaven Our worship is for You alone We build You this throne of praise We build You this throne of praise We build You this throne of praise
